calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court vacated the previously issued tentative ruling and issued a new tentative ruling at 4:10 pm which it adopts as follows:

DEFENDANT SONOMA CAR CARE, INC.'s Motion To Set Aside Judgment.

Defendant Sonoma Car Care, Inc.'s motion to set aside judgment is denied. Assuming that CCP 473(b) can be used to vacate a stipulated judgment, the record on this motion shows that Sonoma Car Care has not substantially complied with the payment terms of the parties' agreement or that there is a persuasive excuse for its non-compliance.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-02-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
